name: banksync-mcp
description: Connect to your bank accounts — transactions, balances, investments, and loans across 15,000+ institutions.
long_description:
BankSync MCP gives Claude secure access to your real financial data. Ask about transactions, check balances, track investments, and sync data to Notion, Google Sheets, and Airtable — all through conversation.

28 tools across 7 categories: workspace management, bank connections, account data, financial queries (transactions, balances, holdings, trades, loans), automated data pipelines (feeds), and sync job management.

Supports 15,000+ institutions via Plaid (US/UK/CA) and Basiq (AU/NZ).

api_key.title: BankSync API Key
api_key.description: Your API key from banksync.io/developers (starts with bsk_)

tools.name: get_bank
tools.description: Get a bank connection and its accounts

tools.name: list_accounts
tools.description: Fetch live accounts from an institution

tools.name: get_data_type_schema
tools.description: Discover available fields for a data type
